data.settleTest: A Europe-scoped (or CE-7) hyperscale capacity split from CBRE or Synergy for Q4 2025 — an existing/purchasable dataset that would settle whether hyperscale's reachable share in Central Europe is ~0.44 or materially lower.

proposedCorrection.rationale: CBRE Q4-2025 data shows ~60% of Europe's operational hyperscale self-build sits in Ireland/Netherlands/Sweden/Belgium (largely outside the venture's CE reach), so the global-share carve-out overstates the reachable CE hyperscale segment by roughly half.

researchQueries.query: CBRE Europe Data Centres Q4 2025 report country-level breakdown of hyperscale self-build capacity for Poland, Germany, Austria, Czech Republic (CE-7)

Synergy Research or DatacenterDynamics 2026 data showing Central/Eastern Europe hyperscale campus pipeline reaching or exceeding 40% regional share (e.g., WBS Power Lublewo 3.2GW and other CE-7 groundbreakings)
